description:
First subticket of fz-ul4.11. Foundation types for the new runtime value representation.

## Goal

Define FzValue (tagged u64), HeapHeader, HeapKind, and box-based allocator stubs. Standalone types with round-trip tests. NO GC, NO JIT integration yet (those land in .11.2 and .11.7+).

## Decisions captured (do not relitigate)

- Low-bit tags, NOT NaN-boxing. Fits Elixir-flavored / per-process-heap / shared-address-space design. Simpler GC integration; pointers are always low-bit-zero.
- Tag scheme:
    000 ptr to heap object (8-byte aligned)
    001 small int (61-bit signed, 1-bit shift)
    010 atom (61-bit interned id, payload << 3)
    011 special (nil / true / false / sentinels in payload bits)
    1xx reserved (future: boxed float, etc.)
- Region info lives in HeapHeader.flags, NOT in the tag. Saves tag bits.
- Schemas are foundational from day one (see .11.2). Frames, tuples, future user records, continuations all use Struct{schema_id}. No per-fn trace helpers — schema-driven generic tracer.
- Atoms stay tagged inline with 32-bit ids. Won't exhaust at fz scale; revisit only if needed.

## Deliverables (new src/fz_value.rs)

```rust
#[repr(transparent)]
pub struct FzValue(u64);

impl FzValue {
    pub const fn from_int(n: i64) -> FzValue;
    pub const fn from_atom_id(id: u32) -> FzValue;
    pub const NIL: FzValue;
    pub const TRUE: FzValue;
    pub const FALSE: FzValue;
    pub fn from_ptr(p: *mut HeapHeader) -> FzValue;
    pub fn tag(self) -> Tag;
    pub fn unbox_int(self) -> Option<i64>;
    pub fn unbox_ptr(self) -> Option<*mut HeapHeader>;
    pub fn unbox_atom(self) -> Option<u32>;
}

#[repr(C, align(16))]
pub struct HeapHeader {
    pub kind: u16,         // HeapKind discriminant
    pub flags: u16,        // GC mark bit, region tag, etc.
    pub size_bytes: u32,   // total object size including header
    pub schema_id: u32,    // 0 if not Struct; else index into SchemaRegistry
    pub _reserved: u32,
}

#[repr(u16)]
pub enum HeapKind { Struct=0, List=1, Bitstring=2, VecI64=3, VecF64=4, VecU8=5, VecBit=6, Map=7 }
```

Box-based allocator stubs (Box::leak for v1; real allocator in .11.2):
- alloc_struct(schema_id, payload_size) -> *mut HeapHeader
- alloc_list_cons(head: FzValue, tail: FzValue) -> *mut HeapHeader
- per-kind helpers as needed

## Tests

- Tag round-trip per Tag variant.
- from_int(MAX) -> unbox_int round-trips.
- Atom id encode/decode.
- size_of::<HeapHeader>() == 16.
- Allocate List cons cell; verify header.kind == List, size_bytes == 32 (16 header + 16 payload).
- FzValue::NIL / TRUE / FALSE distinguishable.

## Out of scope

- GC (.11.2)
- Schema registry (.11.2)
- JIT/AOT integration (.11.7-.11.9)
- User-definable struct syntax (future epic)

## Next

.11.2 — schema registry + heap allocator + mark-sweep STW
title: Tagged FzValue + heap object header
